The compound 4-(2,4-dihydroxy-5-methylphenyl)-2-hydroxy-5,7,8-trimethylbenzo[e][1,2]oxaphosphinine 2-oxide ( 2f ) was synthesized according to the general procedure. The reaction mixture was stirred for 7 h. The solvent was eliminated under reduced pressure, the resulting oily residue was dissolved in 10 mL of diethyl ether. The formed precipitate was filtered off, washed with 20 mL of diethyl ether and dried under reduced pressure to a constant weight. White solid; yield 0.16 g, 37%; m.p. 232−234 °C.
